Video.summary: Using competitors own video diaries, exclusive action from the pits and the best of the battles, Philippa Forrester will get down to the nuts and bolts of Robot Wars, The Second Wars.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 1

Video.summary: Philippa goes behind the scenes to find out how the shows fighting machines are made, whilst uncovering the trials and tribulations of their frantic creators.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 2

Video.summary: Another visit behind the scenes of Robot Wars Series 2, more exclusive footage and access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of this week’s competitors.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 3

Video.summary: Witness hope, triumph, desperation and defeat as Philippa takes us back to the pits, where competitors make final touches to their Robots, hoping they come back in one piece.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 4

Video.summary: Get a glimpse of how the production team setup the arena for contests such as jousting and pinball. Gain an insight as to how competitors construct their robots from team video diaries.
Video.title: Revealed - Episode 5

Video.summary: Four robots from Germany, four robots from the UK. The competitors will fight their fellow compatriots for a chance to represent their country in a Germany against UK final, to decide which country has the most ferocious machine.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany

Image.alt: The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany
The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany
The Sixth Wars - UK vs Germany

Video.summary: The last heats of the fifth series. Matilda breaks the rules and strays from her zone, inflicting massive damage on unsuspecting robots, much to the dismay of the judges.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: The semi-finals are here and the competitors step up a notch, even the house robots need to be cautious. One of the three losers of the first rounds have an opportunity for redemption in the Losers Melee.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: After this episode, the Grand Final lineup will be decided. With pressure mounting the robots are going all out. One competitor is sent to the clouds with the help of another. The house robots help decide who makes it to through.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: This episode, Robot Wars: The Fifth Wars will have a champion. As the proven best robots of the series gather one last time, the competition has never been more evenly matched.
Video.title: The Fifth Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: Dynamic duo Craig Charles and Philippa Forrester are back for the Sixth Wars. Two-time World champions and Fifth Wars Champions compete in this explosive first episode, will their hopes be dashed at the start?
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: The competitors waste no time getting stuck into the fray in the four way melees, with one robot seemingly dominating the competition. The house robots may be a little rusty as a robot launches an attack.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: Former two-time UK champion returns to the arena, and after losing its title in the last series, they have a score to settle. Will another robot foil their plans and take their spot in the finals?
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: The four way melee shows how closely matched the robots are in a nail-biting first round. Mr Psycho gets an opportunity to use his colossal hammer against a competitor. The arena suffers more damage from one of the robots devastating weapon.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: Eight more competitors take on the four way melees to try and secure a spot in the final. A robot seemingly eliminates itself from the competition. The judges make difficult decisions in yet another well-matched heat.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: One newcomer braves the arena against seven veterans in this heat. Mr. Psycho continues to smash any robot unfortunate to get close, cementing his position as a feared house robot.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: An even number of newcomers and veterans prepare themselves to do battle. House robots once again team up against the vulnerable robots, only to be saved by the ever generous Refbot.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: The judges make a controversial decision during the four way melee. Some robots are too strong for their own good as their weapons damage their opponents and also themselves. An intense heat final will decide a worthy winner.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: Despite being teamed up on, a competitor manages to outsmart their opponents. Sergeant Bash gets a taste of his own medicine. The house robots play a vital role in deciding the winner of the heat finals.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: Three axe robots meet in round one as they attempt to chop each other out of the competition. In the semi-finals Growler gets their first real taste of metal.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: A competitor feels the heat of the house robots in the first round. One competitor’s weapon easily immobilizes their opponent, leaving it for the house robots to play with. Two similar robots meet in the final.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: Eight more competitors brave the Robot Wars arena. One of the robot’s attacks backfires in the semi-finals, leading to a tight final with an unexpected conclusion.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: One newcomer makes it to the semi-finals, will they hold their own against the veterans? Two-time World Champions and Fifth Wars Champions Razer battle first as they attempt to gain yet another title.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: An all veteran, action-packed semi-final. The house robots do not hesitate to get involved as the competitors do anything it takes to eliminate their opponents. The Loser’s Melee gives knocked out competitors a chance for redemption.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Semi-Final 2

Video.summary: 96 Robots, down to four. The Grand Final is here and the competition is fierce, only the best robot will survive and win the title of Robot Wars: The Sixth Wars champion.
Video.title: The Sixth Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: Let the battle for the Third Wars crown commence. With the trials being replaced with all out combat, this series is set to be the most brutal yet.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Teams from across the UK enter the arena in hopes of besting the house robots and making it to the Grand Final. The knockouts keep on coming as eight more competitors think they have what it takes to survive the Robot Wars.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: Eight fresh competitors ready to prove their mettle in the arena. Featuring a special event, Middleweight Melee, a single exhibition battle between five robots weighing under 45.4kg.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: As the knockouts continue to streamline the competition, this week’s special has separate competitors trying to knock-down objects and hit targets to score the most points in Pinball Warriors.
Video.title: The Third Wars - Heat D
